ariaSpec.usage: Announces the dialog role of the component.
Associate the title of the dialog.

kbSpec.behavior: Minimizes or restores the state, if the focused element is the window
Maximizes or restores the state, if the focused element is the window
Move the window to the respective direction (UP
Decreases the height of the window triggering the resizing capabilities. Applicable only when the component is resizable.
Increases the height of the window triggering the resizing capabilities. Applicable only when the component is resizable.
Decreases the width of the window triggering the resizing capabilities. Applicable only when the component is resizable.
Increases the width of the window triggering the resizing capabilities. Applicable only when the component is resizable.
Closes the window. When the window is modal, the focus should be returned to the element that triggered the open.
